hooks.name: mempalace-wake-up
hooks.description: Load memory context at the start of agent sessions

hooks.name: mempalace-auto-save
hooks.description: Save session context when the agent stops

action.message: The session is ending. Review what was accomplished and write a concise diary entry to mempalace using mempalace_write_diary. Include: what was done, key decisions made, any open questions, and user preferences discovered. Be brief and specific.
